comment: Validated metrics from Grafana dashboards (mssql_dashboard.json). Metrics collected from MSSQL exporter and chaos-toolkit instrumentation.

rate(db_query_count_total{db_system=\"ms.description: SQL Server query execution rate per second (measures database responsiveness and throughput)

rate(db_query_latency_bucket{db_system=\.description: Query latency histogram (use with histogram_quantile for percentiles)

db_connection_pool_utilization_percent{d.description: Connection pool utilization percentage (0-100) - indicates remaining capacity

rate(db_transaction_deadlocks_total{db_s.description: Transaction deadlock rate (should be minimal in healthy system)

extended_metrics.description: Extended metrics that may be available from MSSQL exporter (optional, for enhanced monitoring)

available_metrics.name: mssql_page_reads_total
available_metrics.description: Total page reads from disk (use with rate())

available_metrics.name: mssql_page_writes_total
available_metrics.description: Total page writes to disk (use with rate())

available_metrics.name: mssql_log_waits_total
available_metrics.description: Total transaction log waits (use with rate())

notes.query_latency_histogram: The db_query_latency_bucket metric is a histogram. Use histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(db_query_latency_bucket{db_system="mssql"}[1m])) to calculate 95th percentile latency.
notes.mssql_specific: MSSQL Server provides page read/write metrics (8KB pages) instead of block metrics like PostgreSQL.
notes.pool_exhaustion_threshold: Connection pool utilization >80% indicates approaching saturation. >90% is critical.
notes.deadlock_threshold: Deadlock rates >1/sec indicate serious lock contention issues. Investigate and optimize queries.
notes.log_space_note: Transaction log space is critical. If log becomes full, database goes into a restricted state. Monitor log_used_percent.
notes.batch_requests: MSSQL typically counts batch requests rather than individual query statements. This is coarser granularity than other databases.
notes.query_compilation: High SQL compilation rate indicates excessive ad-hoc queries. Use parameterized queries to reduce compilations.
notes.lock_storm_test: During lock-storm chaos test, expect deadlock rate to spike significantly.
notes.pool_exhaustion_test: During pool-exhaustion test, expect connection pool utilization to reach 100% and new connections to fail.
notes.all_metrics_validated: All metrics in this file are validated against mssql_dashboard.json Grafana dashboard
